---
title: "Howto disable mouse cursor for the second screen?"
date: 2010-09-20
forum: Desktop Environments
---

### Post by stoynev on 2010-09-20
Hello, I have a strange question:

Can I disable the mouse cursor from the second screen/monitor through Xorg? 

For the second screen the only app I am using is VLC player, everytime when it goes at full screen the mouse goes to the second monitor and this is very annoying. I want to remove the mouse or disable this option from the VLC player, whichever is possible.

Thanks.
